UK Tax Resolution Services

HMRC Claims & Correspondence

Expert handling of all HMRC correspondence, investigations, and tax refund claims. Our tax specialists provide professional representation and ensure your rights are protected.

Get a QuoteBook Consultation

Professional HMRC Representation

Dealing with HMRC can be stressful and time-consuming. Our team of experienced tax specialists handles all HMRC correspondence on your behalf, ensuring accurate responses and protecting your interests throughout any enquiry or investigation.

We have extensive experience with all types of HMRC interactions, from routine correspondence to complex tax investigations. Our technical expertise and understanding of HMRC procedures ensures the best possible outcomes for our clients.

Our HMRC Services

  • All HMRC correspondence handling
  • Tax investigation support
  • Tax refund claims
  • Penalty negotiations
  • Compliance checks
  • VAT and PAYE enquiries

Our HMRC Services

Correspondence Management

We handle all routine HMRC correspondence including information requests, clarification letters, and compliance checks.

Tax Investigations

Full support during HMRC investigations including aspect enquiries, full enquiries, and COP8/9 investigations.

Penalty Negotiations

We negotiate with HMRC to reduce or eliminate penalties, including reasonable excuse arguments and special circumstances.

Tax Refund Claims

Identification and claiming of overpaid tax including historical refunds and amended returns.

Time to Pay Arrangements

Negotiation of affordable payment plans with HMRC for businesses facing cash flow difficulties.

Appeals & Tribunals

Representation at tax tribunals and preparation of appeal documents for disputed tax decisions.

Types of HMRC Enquiries

Aspect Enquiries

Focused enquiries into specific aspects of your tax return, typically one or two risk areas identified by HMRC.

Duration: 3-6 monthsComplexity: Low to Medium

Full Enquiries

Comprehensive review of your entire tax return, all supporting documentation, and business records.

Duration: 12-24 monthsComplexity: High

Random Enquiries

Selected at random regardless of risk profile. These are rare but can be comprehensive.

Duration: 12-18 monthsComplexity: Medium to High

Compliance Checks

Routine checks to verify specific information or ensure compliance with particular tax rules.

Duration: 1-3 monthsComplexity: Low

Our Investigation Support Process

01

Initial Assessment

We assess the scope of the enquiry and develop a response strategy.

02

Document Gathering

We collect and organize all relevant documentation and records.

03

Response Preparation

We prepare comprehensive responses to HMRC enquiries.

04

Negotiation

We negotiate with HMRC officers to achieve the best outcome.

05

Resolution

We ensure proper settlement and closure of the enquiry.

Frequently Asked Questions

What should I do if I receive an HMRC enquiry letter?

Contact us immediately. Do not respond to HMRC without professional advice. Early intervention can significantly improve outcomes. We can review the letter and advise on the best course of action.

How long do HMRC investigations take?

Duration varies significantly. Aspect enquiries typically take 3-6 months, while full enquiries can take 12-24 months. We work to expedite the process while ensuring thorough preparation.

Can you help with tax refunds?

Yes. We identify overpaid tax and prepare refund claims. This includes historical refunds going back up to 4 years, amended returns, and claims for overlooked reliefs.

What if I cannot pay my tax bill?

We can negotiate Time to Pay arrangements with HMRC. This allows you to spread payments over an extended period. We prepare cash flow forecasts and negotiate affordable payment terms.

Expert HMRC Support

Don't face HMRC alone. Get professional representation and protect your interests.
